heading: Hydrothermal research and development
label: 17192 Hydrothermal research and development
notes: Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to hydrothermal research and development.Pub. L. 116–260
Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2
amendments: Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to hydrothermal research and development.Pub. L. 116–260

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out a program of research, development, demonstration, and commercial application for geothermal energy production from hydrothermal systems.

children.heading: Advanced hydrothermal resource tools
children.label: 1 Advanced hydrothermal resource tools
children.text: The research and development of advanced geologic tools to assist in locating hydrothermal resources, and to increase the reliability of site characterization, including the development of new imaging and sensing technologies and techniques to assist in prioritization of targets for characterization;

children.heading: Exploratory drilling for geothermal resources
children.label: 2 Exploratory drilling for geothermal resources
children.text: The demonstration of advanced technologies and techniques of siting and exploratory drilling for undiscovered resources in a variety of geologic settings, carried out in collaboration with industry partners that will assist in the acquisition of high quality data sets relevant for hydrothermal subsurface characterization activities.
